final:
module barrel_shifter (  
    input [7:0] input_data,  
    input [2:0] shift_amt,  
    input direction, // 0 for left, 1 for right  
    output reg [7:0] data_out  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        case (direction)  
            1'b0: // Left shift  
                data_out = input_data << shift_amt;  
            1'b1: // Right shift  
                data_out = input_data >> shift_amt;  
            default:  
                data_out = input_data;  
        endcase  
    end  
endmodule
